channel.title: SB 6025 - Updating the definition of fetal death.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.description: Judy Kimmelman MD signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent ACOG.

item.description: CNM, ARNP, Rachel Johnson signed up to testify Pro.

item.description: MD, Vivienne Meljen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA State Medical Association (WSMA).

item.description: HLTC - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.description: Dr. Alson Burke signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent ACOG - WA Section.

item.description: Eric Lundberg signed up to testify Con.

item.title: 👍💵Alex Wehinger - WA State Medical Association (WSMA)
item.description: Alex Wehinger signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA State Medical Association (WSMA). They are a registered lobbyist.
